name: HMS Cape Barracouta (4.122)
events: 22 Dec 1942 HMS P 49 (Lt. J.P. Fyfe, RN) is undocked at Scapa Flow. She departed for Lerwick later the same day around 1700 A/22 escorted by HMS Cape Barracouta (T/Skr. R.C. Heather, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
